title: Sample local paper card: Retrieval-Augmented Generation Foundations
abstract: Overview card for retrieval-augmented generation systems that connect generated text to external evidence.
why_relevant: Frames the baseline comparison between no memory, retrieved context, and evidence-grounded generation.

title: Sample local paper card: Adaptive RAG for Dynamic Context Selection
abstract: Demo card about systems that decide when and what to retrieve instead of always using the same retrieval policy.
why_relevant: Supports the selective retrieval framing for prior-session counseling context.

title: Sample local paper card: Agentic RAG Planning and Tool Use
abstract: Demo card about agent workflows that decompose retrieval, critique, and synthesis into separate steps.
why_relevant: Gives language for multi-agent decomposition and tool-mediated literature search.

title: Sample local paper card: Long-Context LLM Memory Limits
abstract: Demo card about cost, distraction, and reliability issues in long-context prompting.
why_relevant: Motivates why full-history prompting is not enough for longitudinal counseling notes.

title: Sample local paper card: Conversational Memory Retrieval
abstract: Demo card about retrieving prior conversation facts by relevance, recency, and user intent.
why_relevant: Directly informs prior-session memory selection and temporal validity.

title: Sample local paper card: Clinical Documentation Summarization
abstract: Demo card about turning clinical conversations into structured draft notes with human review.
why_relevant: Anchors the documentation workflow and review-burden evaluation.

title: Sample local paper card: Evidence-Grounded Generation with Source Links
abstract: Demo card about linking generated claims to source snippets and measuring unsupported statements.
why_relevant: Matches the evidence mapping requirement for Re:mind notes.

title: Sample local paper card: Human-AI Verification Workflows
abstract: Demo card about interfaces that help users inspect, edit, and approve AI-generated outputs.

title: Sample local paper card: Source Attribution Interfaces
abstract: Demo card about UI patterns for showing why a generated statement is supported by evidence.
why_relevant: Helps design the document transform preview and evidence-linked draft.

title: Sample local paper card: Mental-Health LLM Evaluation
abstract: Demo card about evaluating LLM behavior in mental-health-adjacent settings without replacing clinicians.
why_relevant: Keeps counseling domain claims within documentation assistance and safety boundaries.

title: Sample local paper card: Counseling Documentation Workflow
abstract: Demo card about counselor documentation burden, structured records, and review checkpoints.
why_relevant: Connects the research plan to Re:mind's target user workflow.

title: Sample local paper card: LLM Safety Guardrails for High-Stakes Drafting
abstract: Demo card about preventing unsupported inferences and keeping humans responsible for final decisions.
why_relevant: Supports safety guardrails, missing-information flags, and counselor-review fields.
